removeRow.body: if(e){ e.data=e.data||{}; const i=Number(args.index); if(i>=2 && i<=20){ e.data['deleted_'+i]=true; }}

addSpecRow.body: if(e){ e.data = e.data || {}; const max=20; for(let i=2;i<=max;i++){ if(e.data['deleted_'+i]===true){ e.data['deleted_'+i]=false; return; }} const n=Number(e.data.spec_count||1); e.data.spec_count=Math.min(n+1,max); }

initSpecCount.body: if(e){ e.data = e.data || {}; if(e.data.spec_count == null) e.data.spec_count = 1; }
